description: Instance migrate id-echo: a confirmation message plus the affected Linode and, when the caller picked a destination, the target region. The migrate endpoint returns no resource body, so these echo the request. region is explicit-presence, so it is present here and omitted when the caller lets Linode pick.

input.message: Migration initiated for instance 123 to region us-east

canonical.message: Migration initiated for instance 123 to region us-east
